forecast.executiveSummary: Cloud spending is projected to reach $26,457 next month, reflecting significant growth of 10.8%. The three-month forecast averages $21,885/month (range: $25,300–$27,742). Seasonal patterns have been detected in historical spending, suggesting cyclical cost variations that should be factored into budgeting.
